title: Patient
description: Schema for a single patient record in the drug interaction alert system

name.description: Full name of the patient; used as the search key in the patient name search bar

dateOfBirth.description: Patient date of birth in ISO 8601 format

age.description: Patient age in years at time of record creation; derived from dateOfBirth

sex.description: Biological sex of the patient; relevant for drug dosing and contraindications

medications.description: List of drugIds currently prescribed to the patient; each resolves to a full drug record via hash map

items.description: drugId reference — foreign key to the drugs collection

allergies.description: List of known allergens; matched against allergyConflicts.allergen in drug records. Can be empty.

conditions.description: List of active medical conditions; matched against conditionConflicts.condition in drug records

dietaryHabits.description: List of notable dietary habits or regularly consumed items; matched against dietaryConflicts.item in drug records

clinicalNotes.description: Free-text clinical notes entered by the treating physician or pharmacist; not used in automated alert logic
